hero.subheadline: The modern directory of Latin professionals and businesses. From freelancers to large companies, all in one place.

features.visibility_body: Show up in local searches and get found by the Latin community across NZ.
features.leads_body: Receive direct WhatsApp contacts from people looking for your service.
features.community_body: Be part of a network that values and supports Latin businesses.

footer: LatinoNZ — Made for the Latin community in New Zealand.

modal.social_proof: +25 businesses have already secured their spot —
modal.title: Join the Waitlist
modal.subtitle: Register your business to be one of the first to access the LatinoNZ platform.
modal.field_whatsapp_error: Please enter a valid WhatsApp number.
modal.field_email_error: Please enter a valid email address.
modal.submit_error: Please fill in all fields correctly.
modal.success_body: Your business has been added to our list. We'll notify you via WhatsApp and email when the platform launches!
modal.error_duplicate: This email is already on our list. 🎉
modal.error_rate_limit: Too many attempts. Please try again in a few minutes.
modal.error_generic: Could not save right now. Please try again.
